title: trifolium alpestre f. lanigerum
intro: Trifolium alpestre f. lanigerum, also known as the woolly alpine clover, is a subspecies of the alpine clover plant that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Trifolium alpestre f. lanigerum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments, from colds and flu to menstrual cramps and respiratory issues.
